purpose: Machine-readable index for tezkire and tezkire-adjacent Markdown extracts. The Markdown files retain narrative headers with legacy label variation; this index is the stable metadata surface.

records.source_citation: Abd al-Rahman Jami, Munsha'at verse response on Cihanshah's Divan; transmitted via Hikmet 1991 and Macit 2000.
records.access: Indirect extraction from Hikmet 1991 as reproduced by Macit 2000.

records.source_citation: Muhsin Macit, Cihansah ve Turkce Siirleri, bilig 13 (Bahar 2000): 9-17.
Enver Konukcu, Cihan Sah, Turkiye Diyanet Vakfi Islam Ansiklopedisi, vol. 7 (1993), p. 536.
Mukrimin H. Yinanc, Cihan-Sah, Islam Ansiklopedisi, vol. III (1945), pp. 173-189.
